rules: NEVER modify descriptions — they come from the spec
Only set passes: true AFTER interactive E2E verification
TDD: write failing test FIRST, then implement

features.description: ProjectRegistry — core module in atlas/core/registry.py, CRUD on ~/.atlas/projects.json
expectedBehavior: ProjectRegistry.list() sorted by last_opened desc, capped at 20

features.description: Server Pydantic schemas for project API — ProjectEntrySchema, ProjectOpenRequest/Response, etc.
expectedBehavior: All 7 project schemas importable from atlas.server.schemas
ProjectEntrySchema.from_registry() converts registry entry to schema

features.description: 5 new API routes — GET /api/projects, POST /api/projects/open, POST /api/projects/switch, DELETE /api/projects/{path}, GET /api/scan/status
expectedBehavior: All 5 routes return correct status codes
project.switched + scan.progress events wired to WebSocket

features.description: Welcome Screen — atlas/dashboard/welcome.js, shows recent projects + Open Folder input
expectedBehavior: Welcome.js renders recent projects list from /api/projects
Click project card → POST /api/projects/open → navigate to graph
Open Folder input → POST /api/projects/open → show progress bar

features.description: Project Switcher — dropdown in navbar, shows current project, instant switch via /api/projects/switch
expectedBehavior: Dropdown toggles on click, closes on outside click
'Open Folder' + 'Recent Projects' buttons → navigate to welcome

features.description: CLI commands — atlas . (dot), atlas open, atlas projects (list/remove)
expectedBehavior: atlas projects → list all registered projects
atlas dot <path> → scan if needed + serve + open browser

features.description: Auto-rescan — opening/switching projects triggers L0+L1 scan if files changed
expectedBehavior: Reopen with unchanged files → skips scan
Reopen after file modification → triggers incremental rescan

features.description: Code review validation for Plan 7 — 4-axis review (functionality, quality, design, performance)
